title: The penny magazine of the Society for the Diffusion of Useful Knowledge, issue 3, April 14, 1832

quoteFirst: The telegram ran as follows: “Mainz, 6th of August,
quoteLast: Let Dr. Busch come here and bring with him a Correspondent for the _National Zeitung_ and one for the _Kreuzzeitung_. Bismarck.”
title: Bismarck
